useful_deltas.summary: Added a named-source StockAnalysis/S&P AAPL dividend parser and exact-set ex-date qualification gate with an atomic bounded cross-check CLI and fail-closed behavioral controls.

Falsified full 40-event no-auth AAPL ex-date corroboration: the only reproducible explicitly labeled independent table supplied 20 exact matches but omitted 20 predeclared targets, so ex_date remains wholly unqualified and the equivalent aggregator route closes at partial L0.

critic_findings.finding: A dedicated unexpected in-window ex-date negative control was missing from the exact-set gate.
critic_findings.rationale: The finalizer added a control with every target plus one non-target date inside the bounded ex-date range; it proves ex_date_conflict, exact unexpected-date reporting, empty qualification, and explicit ex_date non-qualification.

critic_findings.finding: StockAnalysis chronology and malformed amount enforcement lacked direct unit boundaries.
critic_findings.rationale: The finalizer added direct parser controls proving zero amount and ex-date-after-record-date rows fail closed while retaining existing identity, source, schema, shape, and duplicate tests.

critic_findings.finding: The rejected six-page source inventory was prose-only rather than a separate machine JSON note.
critic_findings.rationale: A separate JSON is not required for the bounded decision: the reproducible StockAnalysis/S&P 20/40 artifact is decisive, and the other endpoint probes are explicitly narrative, source-specific rejects rather than a universal exhaustion claim. Creating an after-the-fact JSON would not strengthen provenance or reproduce inaccessible/ambiguous payloads.

critic_findings.finding: The double-diagonal NEXT needed explicit anti-fragility constraints to avoid another proxy knob-polish loop.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as an outstanding defect because the merged seed already predeclares exact four-leg percentage and fixed-dollar costs, no-same-bar reentry, absolute max-loss/drawdown/dense-negative gates, chronological multi-symbol falsification, L0-only scope, no first-pass registration, and closed-family non-reopening. It is future work, not a claim in this run.

data_dependencies: Reopening AAPL ex_date qualification requires a genuinely new independent source class that explicitly labels and covers the missing 2016-08-04 through 2021-05-07 target dates; equivalent no-auth aggregator browsing is closed.
Split-adjusted dividend amount and spot qualification remain required before deep-history assignment counts can be calibrated.
Observed historical option surfaces remain required for evidence above L0.
Forward TSLL option archive remains one of three required distinct New York market dates for replay plumbing.
next: Build one minimal paper-only double_diagonal_spread defined-debit BS/daily-bar scaffold with catalog, simulator, smoke, exact four-leg percentage and fixed-$0.01-per-leg costs, no-same-bar reentry, and one-lot max_loss_usd <= $300; run one predeclared multi-symbol chronological dual-cost falsification and reject unless both cost axes are non-vacuously positive with window max DD <= $75 and dense-negative windows <= 5. Keep L0, do not register proxy SHIP on first pass, reopen closed proxy families or the AAPL ex-date inventory, or paper/shadow/arm/live.
